lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has minor scratches and visible surface wear. The interior shows moderate use with noticeable wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are functioning.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required for it to be fully operational.

Looking for a budget-friendly ride that's ready for its next adventure? This vehicle is a solid choice for anyone seeking reliable transportation at a great price! While it shows its history with some visible cosmetic wear and signs of regular use, it remains a dependable performer that gets you where you need to go. Ideal for a first car or a practical daily driver!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant investment to return to reliable operating status. The exterior has several large dents, noticeable rust spots on the wheel arches, and the clear coat is peeling on the roof and hood. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and produces smoke upon acceleration, likely indicating worn piston rings or valve seals. The transmission shifts harshly, and the brakes are near the end of their service life. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the driver's seat, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited as a project car or for parts.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior retains a strong shine with only minor, typical road wear like small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; all power features, the infotainment system, and the air conditioning are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is solid—it shifts smoothly and has a consistent service history. While it isn't brand new, it is a dependable and attractive vehicle that requires no immediate investment. You can expect a comfortable, worry-free driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances refined aesthetics with dependable performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. Offering an exceptional driving experience and a well-preserved interior, this vehicle represents a premier investment for the discerning buyer seeking quality and long-term reliability.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been such a dream to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and weekend trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s totally ready for you to just hop in and go! If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one. Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great new home!

Offered is a mechanically sound 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six powerplant. This high-revving unit utilizes individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power band and crisp throttle response. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a factory variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a documented
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility, offering a smooth, reliable ride that has been meticulously cared for. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, honest character of light road use typical of a car that has been enjoyed but never abused. Inside, the cabin is a clean and comfortable sanctuary; the upholstery remains supple and intact, while the dashboard and electronic controls function perfectly with minimal signs of wear. Mechanically, this car is in strong health, having undergone regular professional servicing. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure road-readiness. Whether you’re navigating daily commutes or embarking on a weekend getaway, this car delivers consistent performance and comfort. It represents a solid, dependable choice for a buyer looking for a quality vehicle that has been treated with respect.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior blend of performance and long-term reliability. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. An ideal selection for the discerning driver seeking executive-level quality and a refined driving experience at a compelling valuation.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, ensuring it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a balance of sophistication and proven value.

Hey there! I’m super excited to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been such a reliable car and is still in wonderful shape, perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend getaway. I've kept up with the maintenance, so it's ready to hit the road whenever you are! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to chat!

This E46 chassis features the high-revving S54 straight-six, boasting individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The VANOS system has been overhauled with Beisan components, ensuring optimal variable valve timing. The rear subframe has been structurally reinforced with plates for long-term chassis rigidity, addressing the platform's primary weak point. Power is delivered through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M differential lock. The suspension utilizes refreshed bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers for precise turn-in. While showing honest aesthetic wear consistent with its age, the mechanical vitals are robust, offering a pure, analog driving experience.
Used car in good condition. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep luster, showing only the lightest signs of careful use consistent with its history. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring premium materials that have aged gracefully; the seating remains firm and comfortable, while every button and feature operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented service history that ensures a smooth, confident driving experience. From the responsive handling to the quiet, powerful engine, it performs beautifully on both city streets and open highways. This is an ideal choice for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable vehicle that has been treated with respect since day one.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a comprehensive service history and robust mechanical integrity, this model offers a sophisticated driving experience. Its refined exterior and well-appointed interior reflect a standard of care that ensures both immediate performance and long-term value. An exceptional acquisition for those who prioritize quality and engineering excellence.

This vehicle represents a distinguished choice for the discerning driver who prioritizes both reliability and sophisticated engineering. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Each component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure sustained performance and long-term value. We invite you to experience the seamless integration of luxury and practicality that this exceptional motorcar provides.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable car without the 'brand new' price tag. Everything runs smoothly, and it looks great inside and out! I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E92 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, renowned for its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution during spirited cornering. The chassis maintains its structural integrity with M-specific suspension geometry and electronic damper control that remains responsive. Recent maintenance has addressed critical preventative items, including rod bearings and throttle actuators, ensuring the high-revving powerplant operates within factory tolerances. While the exterior displays minor road-derived patina, the mechanical synchronization between the dual-VANOS system and the lightweight valvetrain remains impeccable, offering a visceral, analog performance experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience, blending refined performance with everyday practicality. The exterior remains in impressive shape, featuring a vibrant finish and clean lines that catch the light beautifully, with only the minor imperfections expected from a well-loved car. Inside, you'll find a well-preserved cabin where every feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, a testament to its consistent service schedule and proactive care. The tires offer plenty of grip, and the brakes are firm and responsive. If you are looking for a reliable, attractive car that has been treated with genuine care, this is a standout option that is ready for the road today.
